name: Take Cake to the Children
description: One of the four random death minigames. The player controls an early Freddy Fazbear serving cake to six children while a seventh is struck by a car outside.
notes: Verify remaining FNAF 2 death minigames beyond the three seeded here.

name: Foxy Go! Go! Go!
description: A death minigame where a repaired Foxy runs out of Pirate Cove three times; the third time, the children he greets are already dead.

name: SAVETHEM
description: A death minigame in which the player follows the Puppet through the 1987 pizzeria toward her music box.

name: Stage 01
description: A hidden minigame reached via a keypad code, showing Golden Freddy on stage alongside Spring Bonnie.
notes: FNAF 3's nightly follow minigames are not yet individually cataloged here.

name: Fun with Plushtrap
description: A between-nights minigame where the player uses a flashlight to freeze Plushtrap before he reaches the marked spot.
